heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 280f–2 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this part $12,500,000 for each of fiscal years 2026 through 2030.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 280f–2, , formerly § 399I, as added , , ; renumbered § 399J and amended , (C), , , authorized appropriations to carry out this part, prior to the general amendment of this part by .act July 1, 1944, ch. 373, title III, § 399JPub.
